signals.npcLine: Crypto flux dipping, shadows closing on digital wealth.
signals.questPulse: Market pulse weakens; scramble your assets.
signals.worldFeed: Global credits slipping into the void; traders whisper fear.
signals.clueEvent: Market cap bleeds as cryptos falter in digital storm.

signals.npcLine: RAVE’s momentum rising, potential hot spot for covert ops.

signals.clueEvent: RAVE token pulses stronger amidst chaos; eyes on prize.

signals.npcLine: Rustling of AAVE echoes—liquidity nodes shifting fast.
signals.questPulse: Movement detected near lending clusters; dig deeper.
signals.worldFeed: Protocols ripple; lenders brace for unseen pressure.
signals.clueEvent: Unusual activity around debt chains; probe liquidity streams.

signals.npcLine: PENGU rising on rogue waves—grab the chance or crash.
signals.questPulse: Seize volatile moment or be lost in the silence.
signals.worldFeed: Player factions contest over new token tides; danger high.
signals.clueEvent: Penguins' market swim stirs factions; risk the deep.

signals.npcLine: ASTEROID’s weak signature flickers—potential for sudden boom.
signals.questPulse: Keep eyes sharp on cosmic shifts; power plays ahead.
